nasb.text: I am sending you to them who are stubborn and obstinate children, and you shall say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord God.’

esv.text: The descendants also are impudent and stubborn: I send you to them, and you shall say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord God.’

cnv.text: 這人民十分頑固，心裡剛硬，我差派你到他們那裡去。你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說。’

ccb.text: 我派你到那些顽固不化的人那里，向他们宣告，‘主耶和华这样说。’
